main.description: Experienced in building scalable SaaS applications, enterprise systems including school management platforms, CRM solutions, and multi-vendor web applications. Skilled in backend architecture, API design, database modeling, and frontend performance optimization.

skills.title: 3+ Years of Professional Experience
skills.description: Proven track record in full-cycle development of enterprise systems including school management platforms, CRM solutions, and multi-vendor web applications. Experienced in Docker-based deployments and collaborating with product teams to deliver scalable SaaS applications.
skills.frontEndDescription: I like to code things from scratch and enjoy bringing ideas to life in the browser.
skills.backEndDescription: I design robust APIs and scalable backend systems with performance in mind.
